decodability.note: decodability vs shuffled only; LEAKAGE -> transfer to naturalistic activations (not a lexical check on constructed prompts).

transfer.note: TRANSFERS => Delta_c is a real concept direction, not construction leakage. NO_TRANSFER with high within_A/within_B => the in-set AUROC WAS leakage. len_auroc_B high => length confound; distrust all AUROC. dir_transfer is the CAA direction steered at Gate -1b.
